item.title: Whoops
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: People selling you pseudoscience are only interested in unregulated marketing
item.description: Thanks to the_plant_slant for calling these out. The same people fear mongering about regulated medical science specifically pursue homeopathic remedies because supplements have no overhead, and therefore higher profits. Unregulated health and wellness is and industry that produced more than $2Billion dollars more in profit than healthcare last year. No certifications, no licenses, no testing, no oversight into what they sell you.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Joybait
item.description: Spread some compliments. They're free. Boosting someone on the choices they make, like their style, dress, strut, kindness, is very impacting. Complimenting traits that we have less control over such as body characteristics, skin tone, eye color, is less agentic to a person than their choices. Compliments aren't social exchanges. We toss it to someone to keep, and we move along with out day. Expecting a number, a smile, or a compliment back are obligations, not compliments. Spread some positivity in our corner of the world. Cheers
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Yes, you CAN eat cheaper, but...
item.description: The math works on rice and beans. It really does! What did Tony Stark's billionaire dad tell him? "No amount of money ever bought a second of time." They are stealing our TIME. They wealthy are taking the only thing we have in this life. (And it's all the life we get, feel lucky ya got it! Enjoy!) They are killing us. The threat is existential. Stop acting like they can hurt you worse. They are killing us and our ecosphere NOW. We need this ecosystem to live NOW. What are they gonna do, kill us twice?! "What are YOU doing?" There are no AI DC's proposed near me. ICE isn't here for my brown wife. But I have drawn a line in the sand at those two things. I haven't the means to take the fight elsewhere, but I can do what I can at home. All I can say with certainty, "I am a peaceful man. I am not harmless." That's all I got. Easy for an old man with nothing to lose to say, I know. You do you.
item.dc:creator: shalafi71

item.title: Memes vol 716
item.description:
Shoutout to they guy in my comment section who said I’d never experienced a video store because I’m gen z- LMFAOO ok buddy I’m pretty sure I’d know how I was raised but Y’know.
This is from riverdale
How’d they figure this out and how long did it take
I hate Eminem and then my boyfriend told me to look up “they’re trying to cancel who” and oh wow. He wrote a song about killing his wife. He sucks.
I saw a guy at the pharmacy when I was picking up my Prozac that said “even the devil on my shoulder sometimes whispers wtf are you up to now”
After I read Romeo and Juliet in high school I named my jellycat rabbit Benvolio because he’s who I played and I loved him
Me the other day when I wore my super cleavegey black dress and spiked collar and I told my friend I felt like I was appropriating goth culture
I’m going to encourage people to mur[REDACTED]
Bruce tax (and flat Bruce)
Gertie tax- this picture makes me want to cry my little lady is all grown up
Nessie tax

item.title: Animal Videos

item.title: Evil. Pure evil.
item.description: Investigators have found the remains of 117 dogs in various states of decomposition - many of which were found with gunshot wounds - on the grounds of a purported "no-kill" animal shelter in northern California. Authorities excavated open fields at Miranda's Rescue Animal Sanctuary for evidence of animals believed to be buried in mass graves, the Humboldt County Sheriff's Office said. About 600 dog collars were also located. Officials had been investigating potential fraud or animal cruelty after hundreds of animals were discovered missing from the facility. The sanctuary owner has asked the public to "consider all the facts before reaching conclusions". The shelter's owner and operator Shannon Miranda has said in an online statement before the discovery on the property that media coverage and online commentary about the case "have presented an incomplete and, in some cases, inaccurate picture" of the facility. The BBC has reached out to the rescue. Miranda is not facing any criminal charges in the probe. The Humboldt County Sheriff's Office began investigating the rescue in April after receiving "credible information" regarding allegations of felony animal abuse, animal cruelty, fraud, and conspiracy associated with Miranda's Rescue. Local media outlets report the probe was launched after a neighbour admitted to entering the property without permission in April and dug up what they believed were buried dogs. The investigation led to findings that the rescue had brought in 900 animals since the start of 2025 and only had 116 adoptions, Sheriff William Honsal said. More than 700 animals were unaccounted for. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj4gqz5lx1eo
item.dc:creator: trinxter

26 Man Tax: Adam Storke
"All kids are gifted; some just open their packages earlier than others." - Michael Carr So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Soot…
item.dc:creator: Fanner50

item.title: Hard choices
item.dc:creator: CrimsonPermanentAssurance

item.title: War or not, Ukrainian goths gotta goth
item.description: A second picture I took of a someone I ran into after work (sorry, I lost her name) who had to Interrupt her studies in Kharkiv, and is now living here in Berlin, but is happy that she at least is still able to get her goth on. A couple of notes: - Location: Pariser Platz, Berlin - Camera, lens, and EXIF info: OM Systems OM-1, Olympus M.Zuiko digital ED 45mm 1.2 PRO, ISO-200 f/1.2 1/6400 sec - The evening sun was in the background, to the right, but I positioned my subject in the light reflecting from a building behind us (and I used a portable reflector as well) to light up her face. Her velvet top didn't reflect any light at all, which worked out well in this shot.
item.dc:creator: ShartBlaster3000FormerlyKnownAsFartBoi2000

item.title: Bagging It
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Donold Who?
item.description: Never forget, never forgive.
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: ITS MY CAKEDAY
item.description:
I lurked on imgur for years but only signed up to comment and post shortly after my transition started. Imgur changed a lot during that time too, and has slowly become a far more welcoming place too. When I started posting stuff here I was I think the only out trans woman here (a couple of posters who were *totally cis and just wearing skirts for the bit bro* have come out since then and are awesome), but now it seems that every other poster here is trans. Which is, y'know, cool. July 2018 - Existing but not living July 2019 - Early months of transition, facial changes not yet started, rocking a cheap wig July 2020 - Facial changes in play, but also a ton of makeup and oh boy was my bra padded. Two padded A cup push-ups worn simultaneously plus boob tape plus breast forms plus makeup. July 2021 - Pandemic Chic. Far less makeup, body I was finally getting comfortable in.
Today (Well, actually a few days ago). Only makeup is eyeliner nowadays. I'm comfortable in my body, like who I am, and am actually living not just existing. I'm not sure if imgur will still be around in another seven years, but if so I'll likely be here too.
item.dc:creator: ThatOtherGirlYouKnow
